offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inconsistent equipment maintenance causes project delays. We provide a scheduling system instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent equipment maintenance leads to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Forums where contractors share tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry of maintenance logs on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a one-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance
Enable CSV import for existing maintenance data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Reduce steps required for user onboarding
